claims.claim: A 12D glimpse can lose distinction relative to the 48D live source and should not silently become the primary interaction surface.
claims.evidence_plan: Link multi_scale_observer_v1 resonance-loss fields, Experience Delta Bus deltas, audit note, and targeted tests.

claims.claim: The multi-scale architecture should fallback to the 48D contract or residual trace when the 12D glimpse loses too much resonance.
Replacing live 48D semantic transport with a 12D contract would be a live protocol/transport authority change.
claims.evidence_plan: Link audit boundary and keep any replacement or persistence prompt wiring behind Mike/operator approval.
